en: And just when everyone thought they were safe...
Spoiler alert, um, season two is on the way, so in the end he obviously didn't kill himself.
ko: 스포일러인데, 시즌 2가 나오니까 결국 자살하지 않은 거야.

en: I know he's your friend, but I don't care.
You had to make your own way here and your own plan, didn't ya?
ko: 여기까지 직접 오고 직접 계획을 세워야 했지?

en: The Jeffrey Epstein joke heard round the world.
ko: 전 세계에 울려 퍼진 제프리 엡스타인 농담.

en: Because let's be real, this was 2020.
The internet hadn't let Epstein's suspicious suicide go, and Ricky?
ko: 인터넷은 엡스타인의 의심스러운 자살을 놓지 않았고, 리키는?

en: He was just saying what everyone else was thinking.
ko: 그냥 다른 사람들이 생각하고 있던 걸 말했을 뿐이야.

en: And in that moment, you could feel the air get sucked out of the room.
ko: 그 순간, 방의 공기가 빠져나가는 게 느껴졌지.

en: Because if Hollywood was already uncomfortable, he might as well take it all the way.
